allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://travel-ai-backend-vwwk.onrender.com/api/v1/chat/message -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""message"": ""I want to plan a trip to Tokyo for 5 days"", ""session_id"": ""test-session-check-001""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://travel-ai-backend-vwwk.onrender.com/api/v1/chat/message -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""message"": ""I want to plan a 5 day trip to Tokyo in April"", ""session_id"": ""topup-test-001""}')

Bash(time curl -s -X POST https://travel-ai-backend-vwwk.onrender.com/api/v1/chat/message -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""message"": ""Tokyo trip 5 days"", ""session_id"": ""topup-test-002""}')

Bash(curl -s -N -X POST https://travel-ai-backend-vwwk.onrender.com/api/v1/chat/message/stream -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""message"": ""Tell me about Tokyo as a travel destination"", ""session_id"": ""stream-test-topup-001""}' --max-time 15)

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://travel-ai-backend-vwwk.onrender.com/api/v1/chat/message -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""message"": ""Recommend me a tropical beach destination"", ""session_id"": ""post-topup-003""}')
